questionHtml: Find how many complete months, counted from 1 January 2022, it will take for Mina to have more than $5000 in her account.
markschemeHtml:
N=36.5  (36.4689...)    (A1)

N=37 (months)          A1

 

Note: Allow FT from incorrect GDC inputs seen in part (a) for the first A1 providing that PV and FV have opposite signs and the resulting value of N is positive.

 

[2 marks]
